title: Captain planning dashboard shell with scope chooser and week scrubber
description: Build the skeleton of /admin/league/planning — a desktop/tablet/landscape-first page hosting the scope chooser (My Teams / My Division / Specific Team / All Teams) and the week scrubber (prev/next, date jump, season-aware, past-season toggle).
acceptance_criteria: Page shell renders at tablet (768px+) and desktop (1280px+). Narrow portrait mobile shows a friendly 'Rotate your device or open on a larger screen' nudge with a 'View anyway' escape hatch
Scope chooser is always-accessible: My Teams / My Division / Specific Team / All Teams
Default scope: 'My Teams' when user.player_id maps to an active captain; otherwise 'All Teams'
'My Teams' is derived from the captains table via user.player_id — all teams where the player is an active TeamCaptain or DayCaptain for the active season
Week scrubber shows current week prominently with prev/next buttons and a date-jump picker
Week scrubber is season-aware — does not let the user scrub past season start or after last week by default
'Past seasons' toggle extends the scrub range to completed seasons (read-only)
Selected scope + week persist via query string so the URL is shareable between captains
HTMX partial loads used where appropriate so scrubber doesn't trigger full page reloads

files_to_create: internal/admin/service_planning.go — scope resolution, week navigation helpers
ui_notes: Viewport gate: CSS container queries / matchMedia for the 'rotate or open on bigger screen' nudge
Scrubber keyboard accessible (left/right arrow on focus)

testing_requirements: Manual: week scrubber navigates prev/next + date-jump

context.user_story: As a captain, I want to open one page and be able to glide through any week, across any team — defaulting to my own but never locked to it.
